title: Genetic Research Laboratory
search_placeholder: Search genes by name or components...
no_genes_filtered_message: No genes match your filters. Try adjusting your search or filters.
no_genes_discovered_message: No genes discovered yet. Complete successful backtests to unlock your first genes!

breedingLab.entry_a_exit_b_desc: Entry logic from Strategy A, exit management from Strategy B
breedingLab.entry_b_exit_a_desc: Entry logic from Strategy B, exit management from Strategy A
breedingLab.filters_a_entry_b_desc: Filters from Strategy A, entry/exit from Strategy B
breedingLab.filters_b_entry_a_desc: Filters from Strategy B, entry/exit from Strategy A
breedingLab.balanced_merge_desc: Merge all components from both parent strategies
breedingLab.best_of_both_desc: Intelligently select the best components from each parent (recommended)
breedingLab.title: Strategy Breeding Laboratory
breedingLab.description: Combine two strategies to create powerful hybrid offspring with characteristics from both parents
breedingLab.alert_description: Select two parent strategies and a breeding mode. The system will intelligently merge their components to create a new hybrid strategy configuration.
breedingLab.breeding_mode_desc: Choose how to combine the parent strategies
breedingLab.mutation_rate_desc: Higher mutation rates introduce more random variations in parameters
breedingLab.result_alert_desc: The hybrid configuration is ready! You can now save it as a new strategy or run a backtest to evaluate its performance.

evolutionTree.title: Strategy Evolution Tree
evolutionTree.description: Visualize how your strategies evolved from parent to child configurations
evolutionTree.alert_select_lineage: Select a strategy lineage from the dropdown above to view its evolution tree
evolutionTree.alert_no_data: No evolution data available for this strategy
